digest.greeting: Jean, Tuesday closed with the portfolio and CoE threads still needing a few clean follow-ups, but there was useful movement around Laura's transition materials and a new CoE intake handoff. The main carry-forward is still turning the KPI work into SMART goals for Sara and keeping tomorrow's 1:1s focused.

items.label: Shared Laura's transition materials
items.detail: Jean shared the Laura 1:1 whiteboard and the Templates SMS file with Laura today; Outlook also shows the Laura link was used.

items.label: Routed a new CoE intake to Mar
items.detail: Jean forwarded the new CM-CoE intake for the Pre-AOS, T-AOS Preparation, and T-AOS Submission stages to Mar for visibility.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: Keep this first for Wednesday. The goals reminder and the Jean/Sara 1:1 point to the same next step: convert the KPI set into concrete SMART goals and bring a clear framing to Sara.

items.label: Close the structure-change and MHE RFE support loop with Camilo
items.detail: This remains open going into the July 1 structure change. Use tomorrow's Camilo 1:1 to confirm whether support, ownership, or an operating decision is still needed.

items.label: Review the LLF_CIO_Transition workbook signal
items.detail: Keep the CIO transition implications tied to the Amazon Connect, Agentforce Voice, CoE, and structure-change work so it does not sit as a separate loose thread.

items.label: Capture PM Feedback next steps cleanly
items.detail: PM Feedback still needs a clear owner and follow-up path. Bring any Sara, Eugenia, or Stephanie guidance into one usable next-step note.

items.label: Review the IT spreadsheets with Mar
items.detail: Jessica confirmed the taskset distribution today. The remaining step is to review the Post-submission Case Change and Missing EAD taskset spreadsheets with Mar and decide whether anything needs IT routing, tester ownership, or a cleaner taskset path.

items.label: Triage the intake routing queue
items.detail: The Phase 1 intake alert from Danny Miller still needs a routing decision, and Jean also sent Mar a new CM-CoE intake today. Keep the next owner and queue path clear for each intake.

items.label: Respond to Danny's Incident Response implementation note
items.detail: Danny's note raised an adoption point: the IRG outputs need to be understandable to the team, not just complete as documents. A short reply or next-step note would keep the July 15 draft path aligned with rollout.

items.label: Adjust to the EPMO Liderazgo cadence change
items.detail: Sara's Teams preview said the Monday meeting was canceled because the separate leadership conversations and Friday EOW check-in should cover the purpose. Use 1:1s or ad hoc time for individual questions instead of expecting that Monday forum.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean
items.detail: Good slot for CoE, Staff Augmentation, or dashboard-adjacent dependencies after David's Monday OOO marker.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: Bring the SMART KPI-goal framing and any PM Feedback or structure-change points that need Sara's input.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected 90-minute block after Sara; useful for converting decisions into notes and follow-ups.

items.label: 1:1 Camilo & Jean
items.detail: Use for any remaining structure-change or MHE RFE support loop if today's follow-up does not close it.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Large team meeting for operational updates, lessons learned, celebrations, and project spotlights.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda is portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps.

items.label: Focus time: weekly meeting preparation
items.detail: Use this to prepare Thursday and Friday follow-ups after the Wednesday meeting stack.
